name: Sour Cream Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour the bottom of a 9 X 5-inch loaf pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat together sugar and oil.
4. Add eggs, mashed bananas, sour cream, and vanilla; blend well.
5. Lightly spoon flour into measuring cup; level off.
6. Add flour, baking soda, and salt; stir just until dry ingredients are moistened.
7. Pour batter into prepared pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool in the pan for 5 minutes, then remove from the pan.
10. Allow to cool completely before wrapping tightly and storing in the refrigerator.
11. Makes 1 loaf.
